theme: E1 decadal close (RLP-cadence): measure (full Lighthouse + 56/56 gates) + 30-persona Reviewer Lens Pass run as a parallel multi-agent Workflow + E1 decadal AAR + STATE/STR close cascade. Decadal_cycle 9 (breadth-first nav) deferred by operator.
operator_scope: Close E1 now (Section-5 public-good tease -> E5; breadth-first nav -> later pass). Full 30-persona bench via Workflow. All polish (Ultra heroes + front_page_doctrine §1/§4 + Mermaid/OG) bundled in cycle 148 + redeploy at close.

measure.lighthouse: desktop preset, 5 representative pages (home/concept/tutorial/glossary/adopter): Performance 100 ALL (hard gate MET; home 97->100 vs Phase-7 baseline); Accessibility mean 99 (home 96 = mobile target-size; others 100); Best-Practices 100 ALL; SEO 100 ALL; prefers-reduced-motion honored
measure.playwright_gates: 56/56 (fixed 2 pre-existing dark-mode AA misses this cycle 148)
measure.axe: 0 WCAG-AA color-contrast violations BOTH dark and light on the 5-page sample

reviewer_lens_pass.mechanism: full 30-persona bench (14 reviewers + 16 adopters) run as ONE parallel multi-agent Workflow with a structured StructuredOutput schema; synthesis (adopter matrix + reviewer scorecard + priority queue) computed in-loop
reviewer_lens_pass.subagent_pool: ~1.92M subagent tokens / 30 agents / 253 tool-uses / ~173s (parallel pool, separate from the main-loop content budget)
reviewer_lens_pass.gate_note: Expected — the >=4.95 multi-track gate is a D20/E6 SITE+REPO exit condition, never a single-decadal gate (D11 closed 4.5, D14 4.75). E1 sets the E-series adopter baseline at 4.19. The two low dims (actionability 3.63, relevance 3.81) are dominated by DELIBERATELY DEFERRED scope (participation/join -> E4, marketplace affordances -> E2, public-good proof -> E5), not brand defects; all 6 mandatory design/brand lenses APPROVE.

priority_queue: E4: one participation/join CTA above the fold + governance surface
E2: marketplace pull/compose/publish affordances on registry cards
E5: surface one real public-good vault now (WGA/Rare Archive) ahead of the full showcase

fast-follow: NetworkDiagram edge opacity 0.32->~0.5 + topology honesty; light-mode hero variant; How-it-Works double-3-up density split; mobile target-size spacing; operator-gated hero concrete-clause
deploy: redeploy at close via vercel deploy --prebuilt — ships cycle-148 Ultra section heroes + the 2 dark-mode a11y fixes
notes: E1 CLOSED. First ecosystem-build decadal + first E-series decadal + first FULL 30-persona RLP (run as a Workflow). The RLP priced the operator's deferral decisions instead of hiding them: E1 closed GREEN on brand/positioning (the design/brand reviewers' remit, all approve) with a 4.19 adopter baseline whose shortfall is entirely deferred-scope, routed to E2/E3/E4/E5. Next mover: E4 aDNANetwork (least-gated). #needs-human: rotate SS_VERCEL_TOKEN (recurring CLI-stdout leak class).
